title: HyperType MVP architecture
content:
HyperType = Windows text expander. Single Tauri v2 app, two planes that never block each other:
- Hot plane (pure Rust, always resident): WH_KEYBOARD_LL global hook on its own thread (message pump) -> mpsc channel -> engine thread. Engine owns rolling Vec<char> buffer + [u8;256] keystate, decodes via ToUnicodeEx (foreground layout), matches, expands. No polling; threads block on GetMessage/recv.
- Management plane (SolidJS in WebView2, on demand): tray window for CRUD + enable toggle, via Tauri IPC. Never in keystroke path.

Key decisions:
- MSVC toolchain pinned via rust-toolchain.toml (machine default was GNU). VS 2026 Build Tools present.
- tauri.conf.json app.windows = [] (NO startup window). Window created only on manual launch or tray "Open"; --minimized (autostart) stays tray-only so NO WebView2 spawns at idle. This is what hits <20MB / 0 webview idle.
- Hook drops LLKHF_INJECTED events -> ignores our own SendInput output (no self-match). SIDE EFFECT: synthetic SendInput/SendKeys cannot trigger expansion; only physical typing does. Cannot e2e-test expansion via scripts.
- Matcher: HashMap<trigger,expansion> + max_len; suffix match longest-first with word-boundary-before rule (stops 'gm' firing in 'programming'). Unit-tested in snippets.rs.
- Expansion default = clipboard paste (save/set/Ctrl+V/restore, 90ms settle); native Unicode SendInput as fallback. Backspaces delete trigger.
- Storage: JSON at %APPDATA%\HyperType\snippets.json, atomic temp+rename. Defaults seeded on first run (gm/addr/sig/brb/omw).
- Password guard: ES_PASSWORD native fields only (best-effort); browser fields need UIA later.
- windows crate 0.58. HKL imports from Win32::UI::Input::KeyboardAndMouse (NOT TextServices).

Modules in src-tauri/src: main, keyboard, engine, snippets, storage, expansion/{mod,inject,clipboard}, platform, ipc, app_state, logging, consts.

title: HyperType build/run/test commands
content:
Verified working (Windows, from project root C:\Users\hi\desktop\Hypertype):
- pnpm install  (needs pnpm-workspace.yaml with `allowBuilds:\n  esbuild: true` or pnpm 10 blocks esbuild postinstall and exits 1, which also breaks `pnpm tauri ...`).
- pnpm tauri icon src-tauri/icons/source.png  (generated full icon set from a 1024px PNG made via System.Drawing).
- pnpm build  (vite -> dist, ~14.5KB JS).
- cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml  (debug)
- cargo build --release --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml  (release, ~1m50s, exe 4.23MB)
- cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml  (4 matcher tests pass; do NOT pipe with 2>&1 in PS, it raises NativeCommandError noise)
- Run headless/idle: src-tauri/target/release/hypertype.exe --minimized
Measured release idle: 16MB working set / 2.2MB private, 0 CPU over 3s, 0 WebView2 procs spawned.
Dev: pnpm tauri dev. Installer: pnpm tauri build -> src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/.

title: HyperType MVP status + next steps
content:
STATUS: Windows MVP complete and compiling+running. Release exe verified: boots, installs hook, seeds snippets.json + log, runs tray-only background process, all perf targets met (idle 0% CPU, 16MB RAM, 4.23MB binary, no idle WebView2). Matcher unit-tested. UI (status/toggle/add/remove/quit) built but NOT visually verified in this session (headless). Expansion logic not e2e-verified because synthetic input is intentionally ignored - REQUIRES PHYSICAL TYPING to confirm.

NEXT STEPS / TODO:
- User should manually run `pnpm tauri dev`, open the window, and physically type `gm ` in another app to confirm end-to-end expansion.
- Add UI toggle for autostart (backend wired, no UI control yet).
- Password detection: add UIA for browser/Electron fields.
- Consider Aho-Corasick if snippet count grows large (current suffix-scan is O(maxlen) per key, fine for now).
- Tray "Enabled" check item does not re-sync when toggled from the UI (minor).
- IME: only best-effort (skips during composition).
- ARCHITECTURE.md (Phase 1 design doc) was NOT saved to disk (user pivoted to build before it was written). README.md covers the MVP.

title: Apple-dark redesign + autostart UI + tray sync shipped
content:
Redesigned HyperType UI to clean Apple dark mode (Cursor-like neutral charcoal): grouped Settings-style cards (General / New Snippet / Snippets), Apple systemBlue #0a84ff accent replacing lime, iOS pill switches, sliding-thumb segmented control, hex neutral palette in styles.css (full rewrite), DESIGN.md updated to match. index.html pre-paint + main.rs background_color now #0e0e0e.

Functional additions: (1) Launch at Login toggle — frontend calls @tauri-apps/plugin-autostart JS bindings directly (deps + capabilities were already present, just unwired); browser mock included. (2) Tray/window state sync fixed both directions: main.rs manages TrayToggle(CheckMenuItem) + sync_tray_toggle() helper, ipc::toggle_enabled now takes AppHandle and updates the tray checkmark; tray toggle handler emits "enabled-changed" event which App.tsx listens to (onEnabledChanged in lib/ipc.ts).

Verified: cargo test 21/21 pass, pnpm build clean (21.7KB JS), pnpm tauri dev compiles and runs. NOT yet verified (needs physical input): text expansion e2e, hotkey suppression, autostart registry entry. Repo still has ZERO commits (everything staged/unstaged on master).

title: Pure-black flat redesign + blue-H logo unification
content: Pure-black redesign + logo unification shipped (2026-07-02). User asked: "black background, clean smooth sharp design, same logo everywhere". Changes: (1) styles.css: --bg #000, all tokens darkened (--raise #161616, --field #131313, --line #1f1f1f, --sep #1a1a1a), radii sharpened to 7px fields/seg/rows, layout stays FLAT — mid-task I briefly reintroduced grouped cards + UPPERCASE section labels and had to revert because user previously rejected both ("no cards weird stuff", no eyebrows). Do not reintroduce cards or uppercase labels. (2) Logo standardized: src-tauri/icons/source.png regenerated as flat systemBlue #0a84ff rounded square (22% radius) + white capsule H via PowerShell System.Drawing; full set regenerated with `pnpm tauri icon src-tauri/icons/source.png`. In-app mark is now an inline SVG replica in App.tsx (src/assets/logo.png DELETED); mark doubles as engine light (blue running / #2b2b2b paused via .mark.paused). (3) Pre-paint: index.html html{background:#000000}, main.rs background_color Color(0,0,0,255). DESIGN.md rewritten to match (it had described cards while CSS was flat — that drift caused my mistake). Verified: pnpm build clean (9.2KB CSS), cargo check clean, visually confirmed in native Tauri window via PrintWindow PW_RENDERFULLCONTENT screenshot (SetForegroundWindow+CopyFromScreen fails — focus-stealing blocked, captures occluding window). Gotcha: `pnpm tauri dev` exits 0 instantly if another HyperType instance is running (single-instance plugin forwards + old instance opens ITS window) — kill all hypertype.exe first.

title: Fixed 9:16 phone-ratio window, stacked composer, no scrollbars
content: Window is now fixed phone-portrait 9:16: main.rs inner_size(396, 704) + resizable(false), min_inner_size removed (user: "make the app not scrollable, ratio like a phone 9:16"). CSS: .composer is flex-direction column (full-width seg / trigger / expansion / Add button), .composer-arrow display:none, .seg no fixed width (seg-mini keeps 128px + flex:none), list scrollbar hidden (::-webkit-scrollbar width 0 — wheel scrolling still works, phone-style, and it is the only scroll region). Verified live in native window via PrintWindow (412x713 outer incl. shadow). DESIGN.md Theme/Layout updated. Note: another session concurrently reworked main.rs IPC (set_insert_mode/set_paste_combo/set_restore_delay_ms replacing set_type_out) — window changes coexist fine.

title: Paste optimization + configurable insertion shipped
content:
Rebuilt HyperType's insertion pipeline per docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-02-paste-optimization-design.md (plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-paste-optimization.md).

Backend: (1) expansion/mod.rs now owns ALL insertion policy as atomics — InsertMode {auto|paste|type}, WPM, PasteCombo {ctrl_v|shift_insert|ctrl_shift_v}, restore_delay_ms (100–2000, default 800). AppState.type_out REMOVED; expansion::expand(len, text) resolves mode itself (Auto = paste if '\n' or >40 chars, else type). (2) clipboard.rs: full-format Snapshot (all HGLOBAL formats — DIB images, HDROP files, HTML/RTF; skips GDI/private ranges, 32MiB cap), restore only if GetClipboardSequenceNumber unchanged; fixes old bug where an expansion wiped a copied image with an empty string. get_unicode_text deleted. (3) inject.rs: paste_steps(required, key, held) generalized from hardcoded Ctrl+V; reuses held required modifiers by class, lifts others, Alt/Win mask kept. (4) storage.rs AppSettings {insert_mode, wpm, paste_combo, restore_delay_ms}; legacy type_out migrates true→Type/false→Paste; unknown enum strings fall back per-field. (5) ipc: set_insert_mode/set_paste_combo/set_restore_delay_ms replace set_type_out; Status carries all fields.

Frontend: 3-way Auto|Paste|Type segment (.seg-3 with data-pos thumb), Paste Shortcut segment, Clipboard Restore slider; Typing Speed + Clipboard Restore values are inline-editable (.value-edit: focus=select-all, Enter/blur commits clamped, Esc reverts) per user request "typeable exact amount, ctrl+a and retype feel".

Verified: cargo test 39/39 (was 21), cargo check no warnings, tsc --noEmit clean, vite build clean. NOT verified: cargo build (debug hypertype.exe was LOCKED — app running; needs restart to pick up changes), physical-typing e2e, terminal combos, image-survives-expansion. User's saved settings.json (type_out:true) migrates to Type so behavior won't silently change.

title: Insert-mode switch verified fixed + motion pass + readable text
content:
Paste/Type switch bug: root cause was App.tsx half-migrated after the insert-mode backend rework — JSX still read status().type_out (removed) and called setInsert() (undefined) → ReferenceError on click → optimistic flash + revert. The concurrent session landed the JSX fix (seg-3 Auto/Paste/Type via changeInsertMode, value-edit inputs, Paste Shortcut seg-combo, Clipboard Restore). Verified working: settings.json now shows user-clicked values (insert_mode auto, paste_combo ctrl_shift_v, restore_delay_ms 200) — full UI→IPC→persist path works. serde rename_all=snake_case on InsertMode/PasteCombo matches frontend strings exactly.

Motion pass added (claude-code): .row.leaving exit animation (160ms fade+slide, remove() waits via setTimeout before mutate), .setting-row.reveal entrance on conditional rows, iOS switch knob stretch on :active (width 22px, checked translateX(12px)), .add press scale(0.98), slider thumb :active scale(1.2). All CSS, spring curve kept, reduced-motion respected.

Readability (user request "read all the text"): window now 420x747 (still 9:16, resizable false), .setting-sub wraps (nowrap/ellipsis removed, 12.5px/1.4), .hint wraps. Verified visually.

GOTCHA for UI automation: synthetic clicks (SetCursorPos+mouse_event) from the sandboxed shell are silently dropped by Windows UIPI — WindowFromPoint confirms the target yet no click arrives (focus ring never moves). PrintWindow capture still works sandboxed. Use dangerouslyDisableSandbox for input injection, and expect the user to be actively using the window (rect moves, instances close).

title: Window enlarged to 480x854 so snippet list is visible
content: Window bumped 420x747 -> 480x854 (still 9:16, resizable false, main.rs open_main_window) after user reported the snippet list was barely visible under the taller settings group. Verified in native window (496x863 outer): all subtitles fit one line, full snippet expansions visible, ~6 snippet rows fit before the invisible scroll kicks in. DESIGN.md Theme updated. Window size history this project: 640x620 -> 396x704 -> 420x747 -> 480x854; user keeps asking "thicker/longer" when content feels cramped - prefer sizing generously for content over strict minimal footprint.

title: Purple lightning-bolt rebrand: icons, titlebar mark, accent
content: Rebranded app to user-supplied purple lightning-bolt H logo pack (HyperType_Logo_Assets/ at repo root, README inside). Icon set regenerated from 04_App_Icons/hypertype-app-icon-dark-1024.png (copied to src-tauri/icons/source.png, `pnpm tauri icon`). Titlebar mark: 03_PNG_Sizes/gradient-clean/hypertype-logo-gradient-clean-128.png copied to src/assets/logo.png, rendered 20px via , paused state = grayscale(1) brightness(.6) filter (engine light). Accent swapped blue->purple in styles.css: --accent #7c2dff (switch fills, Add, field focus), --accent-hover #8d47ff, --accent-down #6d1ef0, NEW --accent-ink #a043ff used for accent TEXT and focus OUTLINES (electric violet; #7c2dff alone is only ~3.2:1 on black, fails AA for text). Rings rgba(124,45,255,.35/.2). DESIGN.md Logo+Color updated. Verified live in native window: gradient mark crisp, purple switches/focus/Add, violet status text. Brand SVGs are auto-traced multi-KB paths - use the PNGs, don't inline. Old blue-H branding is fully retired.

title: Drag-to-reorder snippets: order-preserving store + grip drag UI, verified e2e
content: Snippet reorder feature shipped: Snippets struct in snippets.rs now keeps `order: Vec<String>` next to the HashMap (list() returns user order, insert appends new/keeps position on edit, set_order() drops unknowns + dedupes + appends missing so partial input can never lose snippets; from_map sorts for deterministic defaults). New `reorder_snippets(order: Vec<String>)` IPC in ipc.rs, registered in main.rs; persists via existing save() (file order = user order, load preserves). Frontend: reorderSnippets in lib/ipc.ts + browserMock (mock getSnippets no longer alphabetically sorts). App.tsx: grip button (6-dot SVG, hover-revealed like .del) with pointer drag (startDrag/rowShift: dragged row follows pointer transition-none, bystanders translateY with ease; drop = splice + optimistic mutate + IPC) and ArrowUp/Down keyboard reorder on focused grip. CSS: .grip, .list.reordering rules. 45 Rust tests pass (3 new), tsc clean. VERIFIED e2e with real synthetic drags (dangerouslyDisableSandbox PowerShell SetCursorPos+mouse_event): dragged row 1->3 then back, snippets.json order changed and restored correctly both times.

title: Installers built + Desktop copy; stale icon-resource gotcha and fix
content:
GOTCHA: after regenerating src-tauri/icons (pnpm tauri icon), the exe FILE icons stay stale because the icon .res is compiled by build scripts (tauri-build in src-tauri/build.rs, winresource in installer/build.rs) which do NOT rerun on icon changes — the old resource gets relinked even when the crate recompiles. Fix: touch both build.rs files ((Get-Item ...build.rs).LastWriteTime = Get-Date) then rebuild. Verify with [System.Drawing.Icon]::ExtractAssociatedIcon($exe).

Installer builds (2026-07-02): `pnpm dist` = tauri build (release exe + NSIS bundle at src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/HyperType_0.1.0_x64-setup.exe, ~1.5MB) + custom installer crate (installer/target/release/HyperTypeSetup.exe, ~4.9MB, embeds release exe — MUST be built after tauri build, dist script does this). tauri.conf bundle.active is TRUE with nsis target (the old "no NSIS" preference was superseded — user explicitly asked for "the nsis installer on my desktop"). NSIS setup copied to C:\Users\hi\Desktop\HyperType_0.1.0_x64-setup.exe. All three exes verified purple-bolt icon via ExtractAssociatedIcon: app exe (taskbar/Start Menu/tray after install), NSIS setup, HyperTypeSetup.
